_comment: Cathedral profile configs for K483 Sculptor prototype. One entry per Sculptor instance. scope_classes_allowed enforces IP-as-filter: same bedrock, different property-status per cathedral.

public-wide.description: Broadest reach — public-facing, no guild or private content. Permissive depth filter (levels 3–6 preferred). Sculpt form: brief summary per tablet.

technical-deep.description: Guild-tier audience: engineers, architects, Cathedral operators. Full tablet delivery; no private content. Mid-depth preference (levels 1–3).

private-founder.description: Founder-only cathedral. Receives all scope classes including private/sensitive. Strictest audience, most comprehensive access. Per-topic rollup for deep review.
